summary: Points Feature Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All points-related UI elements present and functional.
passed_tests: ✓ Backend: GET /api/settings/system returns points_per_dollar and points_value_rate
✓ Backend: PUT /api/settings/system updates points configuration
✓ Backend: GET /api/customers returns customers with points field
✓ Backend: POST /api/customers/{id}/points/add adds points to customer
✓ Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with points_used deducts points and reduces total
✓ Backend: Sales order without points_used auto-earns points for customer
✓ Backend: Sales order without customer has no points operations
✓ Backend: Insufficient points returns 400 error
✓ Backend: Points transactions logged in points_log collection
✓ Backend: Sales order response includes points_used, points_discount, points_earned fields
✓ Frontend: POS login and store selection works
✓ Frontend: Customer selector in POS header works
✓ Frontend: Points badge shows next to selected customer (e.g., '607 pts')
✓ Frontend: Payment modal shows points section when customer selected
✓ Frontend: Points input field present in payment modal
✓ Frontend: 'Use all points' (全部) button present in payment modal
✓ Frontend: Points rate display ('100 pts = $1') shown in payment modal
✓ Frontend: Estimated points earned shown in payment modal
✓ Frontend: System Settings page has points_per_dollar field (value: 1)
✓ Frontend: System Settings page has points_value_rate field (value: 100)
✓ Frontend: Points rate summary shown in System Settings

features_verified.points_deduction_on_checkout: PASS - Backend deducts points from customer when points_used > 0
features_verified.auto_earn_points: PASS - Backend auto-earns points at points_per_dollar rate
features_verified.points_log_audit: PASS - Both earn and redeem logged in points_log collection
features_verified.system_settings_points_config: PASS - points_per_dollar and points_value_rate in SystemSettings
features_verified.pos_customer_points_badge: PASS - Shows '607 pts' badge when customer selected
features_verified.payment_modal_points_section: PASS - Shows points input, 'use all' button, available points
features_verified.no_customer_no_points_message: PASS - Shows appropriate message when no customer selected
features_verified.receipt_points_info: PASS - Code shows points_used and points_earned in receipt dialog

seed_data_creation: Used existing customer '测试客户' with 607 points. Created sales orders during testing to verify points earn/redeem.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Points feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints verified: POST /api/sales-orders (with points_used), PUT/GET /api/settings/system (points_per_dollar, points_value_rate). Frontend verified: POS header shows customer points badge, payment modal has points section with input, 'use all' button, rate display, and estimated earned points. System Settings page has points configuration fields. Default rates: 1 point per $1 earned, 100 points = $1 discount.

points_feature_details.points_location_in_pos: Header badge next to customer name, Payment modal has full section
points_feature_details.system_settings_location: 积分比例 (Points Rate) section in System Settings page
